highlights.headline: Bucks hold off Hawks for win

headlines.description: — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 21 points and 17 rebounds and the Milwaukee Bucks snapped a three-game losing streak, holding off the Atlanta Hawks 112-110 on Monday after squandering a 23-point lead in the second half.
headlines.shortLinkText: Antetokounmpo and the Bucks hold off Atlanta 112-110 to snap a three-game skid

headlines.description: — James Harden scored 36 points, and when he finally missed a couple big free throws in the final seconds, the ball came right back to him as the Los Angeles Clippers edged the Washington Wizards 110-106 on Monday for their sixth straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Harden scores 36 as the Clippers hold off the Wizards for their 6th straight win
